name: Backdoor IAM User Console Login via UpdateLoginProfile
description: Simulates an attacker with iam:UpdateLoginProfile permission changing a legitimate IAM user's console password to one they control, enabling console login as that user. High-signal single API call with no prerequisites beyond the target user existing.
prerequisites: IAM user with an existing console login profile (stratus-red-team-update-login-profile-user)
detection_signal: iam:UpdateLoginProfile in CloudTrail where the caller is not an expected administrator or password-reset automation
